data.title: ARK Invest predicts Bitcoin, DeFi, and tokenized assets to shape crypto's future, despite challenges.
data.description: Bitcoin, decentralized finance (DeFi), and tokenized assets are increasingly becoming integral components of the worldwide capital markets, according to ARK Invest. While their adoption is on the rise, obstacles continue to hinder their full potential.
JPMorgan upgrades Molina Healthcare Inc with a higher price target of $194, previously $173.
Australian shares advanced, with the ASX 200 climbing 0.8% to finish at 8,848.70.
JPMorgan lifts its target price for Structure Therapeutics Inc to $105, up from $65.

data.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) stock trending, gained 4.31% to $461.14, down to $460.16 after hours. Q4 earnings projected at $4.85 EPS and $3.17B revenue. Directors acquired stock units.
data.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc. saw trading activities on Thursday, with their shares (NASDAQ: VRTX) from the Massachusetts-based biotech company showing a 4.31% increase during regular trading and a subsequent 0.21% decrease in after-hours trading, settling at $460.16. The closing price for VRTX on Wednesday was $461.14. The company is set to unveil its Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 12 post-market-close, with analysts predicting earnings per share to be $4.85 and quarterly revenue at $3.17 billion. In the third quarter, Vertex topped the estimated earnings of $4.35 with $4.80 per share, alongside a revenue of $3.08 billion. Directors Bruce I. Sachs and Suketu Upadhyay obtained deferred stock units as of Jan. 15, as per SEC filings on Tuesday. A more detailed article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: US crypto official predicts banks and crypto to converge into a unified digital asset industry. Addressing stablecoin yield disputes and crypto market structure legislation stalled in Senate at Davos interview.
data.description: At the World Economic Forum in Davos, David Sacks spoke about the controversies surrounding stablecoin yield and the challenges facing the proposed cryptocurrency market structure regulations currently at a standstill in the US Senate.
Trump Backtracks on Greenland Threats, Lifting Europe Market Outlook

data.title: Trump is set to reveal new Fed Chair next week. Betting market predicts Kevin Warsh as favorite with $49m bets.
data.description: It is rumored that Donald Trump is set to reveal the next Federal Reserve Chair in the upcoming week. The anticipation is high in the betting market, with over $49 million wagered on the question of "Who will Trump nominate as Fed Chair?" Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent hinted that a decision may come as early as next week in an interview with CNBC. Kevin Warsh, a former Federal Reserve governor, is currently in the lead with a 51% probability of being nominated as the next Fed Chair. Data from Kalshi, a federally authorized betting platform, offers insights into the market trends. These developments indicate a significant level of interest and speculation surrounding the upcoming announcement.

data.title: Columbia prof criticizes NYSE plan for blockchain tokenization, calling it 'vaporware'. Enables 24/7 trading w/ instant settlement for stocks, ETFs.
data.description: On Monday, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) introduced a new initiative to implement blockchain technology for round-the-clock trading and immediate settlement of stocks and ETFs, along with providing custody services. This move aims to revolutionize trading practices by leveraging the benefits of blockchain, ensuring faster transaction speeds and increased security. This initiative marks a significant milestone in the financial sector, offering investors the potential for enhanced efficiency and convenience in their trading activities on the NYSE platform.
Piper Sandler Lowers Bank OZK Target $2 to $62

data.title: Fresh Bitcoin whales surpass veteran holders in $6B supply battle, impacting price volatility.
data.description: Recent data shows that newly acquired Bitcoin whales now possess a higher total value compared to long-term holders. This has led to a $6 billion excess supply in the market, potentially causing instability in prices.

data.title: Columbia prof skeptical of NYSE's plan for blockchain 24/7 trading, instant settlement, and custody features.
data.description: On Monday, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) revealed a new initiative to implement blockchain technology for round-the-clock trading and immediate settlement of stocks and ETFs. This plan will also incorporate custody services.

data.title: Senator Boozman confirms no agreement with Dems on crypto bill. Republican draft includes protections for crypto developers. Senate Agriculture Committee plans to markup next week.
data.description: A draft of the market structure bill was released by the US Senate Agriculture Committee, led by Republicans. This draft includes safeguards for crypto developers and is scheduled for markup next week.

data.title: Q4 hinted at a bear market bottom per Bitwise. Despite strong fundamentals, crypto struggled, reminiscent of early 2023 rebound from 2022 lows.
data.description: Matt Hougan from Bitwise stated that despite strong fundamentals, the crypto markets showed poor performance in the fourth quarter. He likened this situation to early 2023, when the crypto market bounced back from lows experienced in 2022.
